title: Federal Reserve +75bps rate hike — largest since 1994
description: The Federal Reserve raises the federal funds rate by 75 basis points on June 15, 2022 — the largest single hike since 1994 — bringing the target range to 1.50–1.75%. Fed Chair Powell signals continued aggressive tightening to fight 40-year-high inflation (CPI 8.6% in May 2022). The S&P 500 enters a bear market (-24% YTD by mid-June). Mortgage rates top 6% for the first time since 2008.
